column1: # Mapping from maintainer email -> GitHub login.
# Some MAINTAINERS files list a person by name and email only (no @handle)
# with a handle that doesn't resolve. This file maps such emails to the correct
# GitHub login so the maintainer is matched against the write-access set instead

column2: github_id (one per line; lines starting with # are ignored).

column1: # The mapping takes precedence over the handle parsed from the MAINTAINERS file.
